checks.invariant: PlatformManifest must not absorb CxRP schemas.
checks.observed: PlatformManifest continues to reference CxRP ownership and does not copy execution or routing schemas into its own model surface.

checks.invariant: PlatformManifest must not absorb RxP schemas.
checks.observed: PlatformManifest continues to reference RuntimeInvocation and RuntimeResult semantics as RxP-owned only.
checks.expected: Reference only, no runtime schema ownership.

checks.invariant: OperationsCenter must not own platform ontology.
checks.observed: repo_graph_factory still consumes the bundled PlatformManifest base and returns RepoGraph or None only.
Docs explicitly keep VideoFoundry external and no VideoFoundry code imports are introduced by this remediation.

checks.invariant: ExecutorRuntime and WorkStation must not collapse conceptually.
checks.observed: Docs and runtime boundaries still distinguish invocation from hosting and deployment.

checks.invariant: Custodian must not become PlatformManifest ontology owner.
checks.observed: Custodian still loads PlatformManifest-owned PMV detectors via a contributor target rather than embedding detector logic.

checks.invariant: No repo should drift toward god-repo behavior through protocol duplication.
checks.observed: OC internal proposal, routing, and execution-boundary models now use explicit OC-native names or compatibility aliases with documented CxRP ownership at the wire boundary.
checks.expected: Compatibility aliases remain bounded while canonical cross-repo ownership stays in CxRP/RxP.
checks.recommendation: Keep the contract ownership tests and mapper checks as a drift guard.
